name: Stew
recipeIngredient: 20 ounces frozen vegetables (such as peas and green beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place beef cubes in a slow cooker.
2. Combine 1/3 cup flour with the salt and pepper; toss with beef to coat thoroughly.
3. Add all vegetables to the slow cooker and mix well.
4. Combine broth, wine, sugar, and Kitchen Bouquet. Pour over meat and vegetables; stir carefully.
5. Cover and cook on LOW for 10-14 hours (on HIGH setting for 7 hours).
6. One hour before serving, turn to HIGH setting. Make a smooth paste of 1/4 cup flour and the water; stir into slow cooker.
7. Cover and cook until thickened.
